name: @meinc/rds
description: Reba Design System - A music-native design system for building beautiful, accessible applications
author: ME Inc.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @meinc/rds-tokens && npm run build -w @meinc/rds-ui-core && npm run build -w @meinc/rds-social-core && npm run build -w @meinc/rds-media-core && npm run build -w @meinc/rds-ai-elements
